overview: A tactical RPG with full cast-chain diagnostics, debug export, summon executor transparency, and magnetic UI panels.
features: Structured attack diagnostics showing exactly where each cast dies
Visible on-tile rejection text for failed attacks
Debug export to PDF and text with battle state dump
Advanced debug controls with filters, search, pause, and copy-all
No-selection enemy click performs the basic physical attack
Summon executor dep audit with full Summons-tab logging
Panel-to-panel magnetic snapping on all four sides
